Original: A Clan is a group of [Families|FAMILY] which act as a single unit. Each Clan can be [Trained|TRAIN] in a [Profession|PROFESSION] in order to grant it the ability to [Harvest|HARVEST] or refine [Resources|RESOURCE], explore the map, [Fight|WARRIOR] enemies, and more. You will usually end up with around 40-50 Clans over the course of a single game.
Translation: [氏族|CLAN]由若干[家庭|FAMILY]组成，并作为一个整体行动。每个氏族都可以被[训练|TRAIN]为某种[职业|PROFESSION]，从而获得[采集|HARVEST]或精炼[资源|RESOURCE]、探索地图、与敌人[战斗|WARRIOR]等能力。一局游戏中通常会有约40到50个氏族。
Note: Trial concept help body; preserves concept IDs.

Original: You can Punish a [Clan|CLAN] in your [SETTLEMENT] after it's committed a [Crime|CRIME] or become involved in a [Feud|FEUD]. Doing so settles the matter and any associated penalties, but strips the Clan of their [Profession|PROFESSION] and [Discipline|DISCIPLINE], and gives them a permanent [Mood|MOOD] penalty.
Translation: 当你的[SETTLEMENT]中的[氏族|CLAN]犯下[罪行|CRIME]或卷入[纷争|FEUD]后，你可以惩罚他们。这样会了结事件及相关惩罚，但会剥夺该氏族的[职业|PROFESSION]和[纪律|DISCIPLINE]，并给予永久[心情|MOOD]惩罚。
Note: Trial concept help body; preserves concept IDs.
